caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and glasses is seated in a recording studio. He wears a large, grey, peaked wig and black headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone with a black pop filter. The background is a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and portraits. To the right, a white storage unit and clothing hanging on a rack are visible. A red and white logo appearing in the lower portion of the frame includes the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his head tilts slightly and his facial expression shifts, moving from a neutral look to a slight frown as he looks downward and then back toward the front.
